subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath directed himself towards the Most Exalted Goal, and he who, yearning, hath advanced towards the Supreme Horizon, and he who hath turned towards [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لقاصد قصد المقصد الاقصی و لطالب اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و لمتوجه توجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of faith; power of the spirit
